untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'reversal patterns' and 'reversal candles' which are not available as indicators in the allowed list. The signal also references support/resistance at MA lines during trend corrections, which requires pattern recognition logic not expressible with the given indicators and operators. Approximation uses MA crossovers as proxy for reversal zones, but this does not capture the nuanced pattern-at-MA-line concept.
translation_notes: Translated the core concept (price interaction with moving averages during trend reversals) into MA crossover logic as a reasonable proxy. Entry conditions assume uptrend/downtrend context and use MA proximity as reversal signal. Exit uses MA crosses as trend break confirmation. Actual pattern detection would require candlestick pattern recognition unavailable in current indicator set.
